header.tagline: Bagh Chingari — Igniting Trust with Quality Safety Matches

home.title: Luminex Sparq Company
home.description: Welcome to <1>Bagh Chingari</1> — the creative extension of <3>Luminex Sparq Company</3>, one of India’s leading manufacturers and exporters of premium-quality safety matchboxes based in Sattur, Tamil Nadu. We’re dedicated to crafting <5>wooden matches</5>, <7>wax matches</7>, and <9>promotional matchboxes</9> that meet international quality and safety standards — lighting up lives across the world with sustainable craftsmanship and precision.

quality.title: Quality
quality.desc: Each matchbox is crafted with precision, ensuring durability, safety, and unmatched lighting performance.

reach.title: Global Reach
reach.desc: From India to international markets, our matchboxes illuminate homes, businesses, and communities worldwide.

excellence.title: Excellence
excellence.desc: Our relentless pursuit of excellence has made us a trusted name in the safety match industry, known for reliability and craftsmanship.

about.title: About Luminex Sparq Company
about.description: <1>Luminex Sparq Company</1> — the creator of <3>Bagh Chingari</3> — stands as a trusted manufacturer of premium <5>safety matches</5> and <7>pure matti sticks</7>. Based in <9>Sattur, Tamil Nadu</9>, we combine craftsmanship, technology, and sustainability to deliver quality products that ignite trust and reliability.

mission.title: Our Mission
mission.desc: To deliver high-quality and safe products that bring reliability and satisfaction to our customers — both in India and across the globe.

vision.title: Our Vision
vision.desc: To be the most trusted and innovative brand in the safety match industry, setting new benchmarks in quality, sustainability, and customer service.

about.footer: “Igniting Trust with Quality” — Bagh Chingari continues to light up lives with dedication and craftsmanship.

product.title: Our Products
product.description: At <1>Luminex Sparq Company</1>, we take pride in crafting products that combine quality, safety, and sustainability. Our products are trusted by customers across India and worldwide for their reliability and performance.

product1.title: Safety Matches
product1.desc: Our premium safety matches are designed to ignite with a single strike, ensuring efficiency and reliability. Manufactured with precision and quality control, they meet international safety standards and deliver a consistent flame every time.

product2.title: Pure Matti Sticks
product2.desc: Our Matti sticks are crafted using high-grade raw materials for a smooth, long-lasting, and consistent burn. Each stick reflects our commitment to purity and craftsmanship.

product.footer: Trusted by thousands, our products light homes, industries, and lives — safely and beautifully.

testimonials.title: What Our Customers Say
testimonials.description: Our commitment to quality and safety has earned us trust across India and internationally. Hear what our satisfied customers have to say about our products.

t1.text: “Bagh Chingari matches are simply the best! High quality, reliable, and safe for my household. I trust this brand completely.”
t1.author: – Ramesh Kumar

t2.text: “The matti sticks are top-notch — smooth, consistent burn, and safe to use. Highly recommend Bagh Chingari products for any household or business.”
t2.author: – Anita Sharma

t3.text: “Excellent product quality and timely delivery. Bagh Chingari has never let us down. Their attention to safety and detail is impressive.”
t3.author: – John Mathew

custom.title: Custom Branding & OEM
custom.description: Stand out with your own identity! We provide complete <1>OEM and Private Label</1> solutions. Whatever your brand name or matchbox specification, we manufacture it with precision just for you.

q1.q: Where are Bagh Chingari products manufactured?
q1.a: All our products are manufactured in Sattur, Tamil Nadu, India, under strict quality control and safety standards.

q2.q: Do you export your products internationally?
q2.a: Yes, we export our premium safety matches and pure matti sticks to multiple countries worldwide, maintaining the highest quality standards.

q3.q: Are the products safe for household use?
q3.a: Absolutely. Safety is our top priority. All matches and matti sticks are designed for safe and reliable use.

q4.q: What is the minimum order quantity?
q4.a: We cater to both retail and bulk orders. Minimum order quantity varies depending on the product. Please contact us for details.
